key_anchor_sections: title; §1 authorization; §1 stk.2 optimization purpose; §6 su.dk publication duty; §10 effective date
cautious_finding: The live official Retsinformation page is not merely title-shell accessible on this host: the browser-rendered DOM exposes the operative legal text stating that the styrelsen may use artificial intelligence or similar digital solutions in connection with SU applications and related case handling, frames the purpose as optimizing case-handling processes, and requires publication on su.dk of the cases where such solutions are used. This strengthens exact-text readability for the Danish governance row without proving operational deployment, procurement, DPIA completion, evaluation, effectiveness, harm, or compliance.
next_safe_move: Reopen Denmark only for a materially different official operational, procurement, DPIA, impact-assessment, evaluation, or implementation document rather than another legal-basis readability replay.
observatory_hook: rare-language legal-text readability control; jurisdiction-language map; public-sector proof-ceiling comparator; reviewer-safe governance quote anchor
